titleEn: Ropa introduces automatic steering system for potato harvesters
titleZh: Ropa为马铃薯收获机推出自动转向系统
summaryZh: 德国农机厂商Ropa为其牵引式Keiler 2 RK22马铃薯收获机推出自动转向系统，可自主控制转向轴、计算行驶速度和转向角，使收获机精确跟随拖拉机路径，无需操作员干预。系统在倒车时也能工作，通过控制杆按钮激活，并在行末自动切换。该功能将于下个收获季上市，旨在减轻操作员疲劳、提升作业便利性。
featuredReason: 该技术将自动驾驶与精准农业结合，显著降低操作员劳动强度，对智慧种植（尤其是块茎类作物收获）的自动化升级具有直接参考价值。
contentFull: Ropa introduces automatic steering system for potato harvesters 01-06 | Smart farming | NewsLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintRopa has introduced an automatic steering system for its trailed Keiler 2 RK22 potato harvesters. The harvester follows the tractor’s track as closely as possible without any input from the operator. Photo: RopaGerman machinery manufacturer Ropa has introduced an automatic steering system for its trailed Ropa Keiler 2 RK22 potato harvester. The system autonomously controls the steered axle.In addition, the automatic steering system calculates the driving speed and steering angle, automatically adjusting the steered axle accordingly. The ‘intelligent trail steering system’ enables the harvester to follow the tractor’s path as accurately as possible. The operator no longer needs to monitor this, reducing fatigue and improving ease of operation.Also works when reversingThe steering system also functions when reversing. Once the automatic trail steering system is activated using a button on the control lever, switching the harvester on and off is controlled via the headland and end-of-row buttons on the joystick. As soon as the machine is engaged in the row, the automatic steering system deactivates itself. When the machine is switched off at the end of the row, the steering system automatically reactivates.Available next seasonThe automatic steering system will be available on Ropa potato harvesters from next season. Pricing has not yet been announced.Join 17,000+ subscribersSubscribe to our newsletter to stay updated about all the need-to-know content in the agricultural sector, two times a week. translationZh:
德国机械制造商Ropa为其牵引式Ropa Keiler 2 RK22马铃薯收获机推出了一套自动转向系统。该系统可自主控制转向轴。

此外，自动转向系统会计算行驶速度和转向角，并据此自动调整转向轴。这套“智能拖车转向系统”使收获机能够尽可能精确地跟随拖拉机的行驶轨迹。操作员不再需要监控这一过程，从而减轻疲劳并提升操作便利性。

**倒车时也能工作**
该转向系统在倒车时同样有效。一旦通过控制杆上的按钮激活自动拖车转向系统，收获机的启动和关闭便可通过操纵杆上的地头与行末按钮来控制。当机器进入行内作业时，自动转向系统会自动关闭。当机器在行末关闭时，转向系统会自动重新激活。

**下个收获季可用**
该自动转向系统将从下个收获季起在Ropa马铃薯收获机上提供。价格尚未公布。
author: Lucas van de Weijer

In addition, the automatic steering system calculates the driving speed and steering angle, automatically adjusting the steered axle accordingly.
